headlines.title: Trump’s high-stakes summit in China
headlines.description: China’s leader gave President Trump a lavish welcome in Tiananmen Square as the superpower summit began. Secretary of State Marco Rubio told NBC Nightly News anchor Tom Llamas that key topics included Iran, Taiwan and trade deals.

headlines.title: Exclusive look at Chinese pandas preparing for trip to America
headlines.description: In the latest round of panda diplomacy playing out between the U.S. and China, NBC News’ Janis Mackey Frayer got exclusive access to the two pandas getting ready for their upcoming journey to Zoo Atlanta in America.

headlines.title: Families of Americans imprisoned in China appeal to Trump for help
headlines.description: After living without their loved ones for more than a decade, two families of Americans detained in China are appealing to President Donald Trump to bring them home as he meets with Chinese leader Xi Jinping in Beijing.

headlines.title: China and U.S. agree Hormuz shouldn’t be ‘militarized,’ Marco Rubio says
headlines.description: President Donald Trump discussed the Iran war and the blockade of the Strait of Hormuz during a summit with President Xi Jinping, Secretary of State Marco Rubio told NBC News in an interview Thursday.

headlines.title: Supreme Court allows abortion pill to remain available by mail
headlines.description: The Supreme Court ordered that patients could receive the abortion pill mifepristone through the mail and without an in-person appointment with a clinician after a ruling by the New Orleans-based 5th U.S. Circuit Court of Appeals on May 1 had imperiled widespread access to the pill.

headlines.title: CIA director travels to Havana to meet with Cuban officials
headlines.description: CIA Director John Ratcliffe traveled to Cuba to "personally deliver President Trump's message" to Cuban leaders that the United States is ready to engage in discussions on economic and security issues.

headlines.title: South Carolina governor calls for a special session on redistricting
headlines.description: Republicans hope to eliminate a majority-minority seat held by longtime Democratic Rep. Jim Clyburn before the November midterm elections.

headlines.title: The toxic aftermath of the L.A.-area fires
headlines.description: Since the L.A.-area fires, Altadena residents have found toxic compounds such as lead and asbestos in their living spaces and lots. Many have not returned home.

headlines.title: Kansas City is using ‘Midwestern pioneering spirit’ to host the World Cup
headlines.description: It might be the smallest U.S. city to host the FIFA World Cup this summer, but Kansas City organizers are hoping to be considered the mightiest by fans who will be arriving in the Midwest to celebrate the biggest single-sport tournament in the world.

headlines.title: Read the full transcript: Secretary of State Marco Rubio interviewed by ‘NBC Nightly News’ anchor Tom Llamas
headlines.description: Rubio spoke about Iran, Taiwan, Cuba and more during President Donald Trump’s trip to Beijing for a high-stakes summit with Chinese President Xi Jinping.

headlines.title: AI-generated pro-Spencer Pratt mayoral campaign videos point to a new political reality
headlines.description: Spencer Pratt’s bid for Los Angeles mayor gained viral traction after AI videos, which Pratt said were “fan-made,” circulated across social media.

headlines.title: Chiefs-Bills, Patriots-Seahawks among top 10 games of the 2026 NFL season
headlines.description: After a slow trickle of leaks and announcements, the NFL announced its schedule for the 2026 season Thursday. These are the best matchups.
